chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Bail Application No.S-1580 of 2025 Applicant: Arsalan s/o Muqarab Khan (on bail) through Mr. Ali Abbas alias Nouman Ali, Advocate. Complainant: Muhammad Ayoub s/o Muhammad Rafiq through Mr. Azan Ali Memon, Advocate (files power today). The State: through Mr. Shahid Shaikh, Additional P.G Date of hearing: 16.04.2026 Date of Order: 16.04.2026 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA J:- Through instant Bail Application, applicant named above seeks pre-arrest bail in Crime No.95 of 2025 registered under Section 397 PPC at Police Station GOR Hyderabad, after his bail plea was declined by the learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge/MCTC, Hyderabad, vide order dated 20.12.2025. 2. The details and particulars of the F.I.R. are already available in the bail application and F.I.R., same could be gathered from the copy of F.I.R. attached with such application, hence need not to reproduce the same hereunder. 3. At the outset counsel for the complainant files a statement along with Affidavit of No Objection on behalf of the complainant Muhammad Ayoub (CNIC No.41303- 1223224-1) and state that complainant has No Objection if the interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant/accused is confirmed. 4. On the other hand, learned Additional P.G in the light of No Objection extended by the complainant has also recorded his No Objection. 5. Heard learned counsel for the parties and Additional P.G. The offence with which the applicant is charged is non-compoundable. Per both the counsel in order to bury their hatchets and due to intervention of their Nekmards, the complainant has submitted his No Objection for confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant.

The offence with which the applicant is charged is non-compoundable. Per both the counsel in order to bury their hatchets and due to intervention of their Nekmards, the complainant has submitted his No Objection for confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant. Accordingly, the interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant vide order dated 24.12.2025 is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. This order is limited to the concern of bail alone and shall not prejudice the case of either side at trial. The applicant / accused is however directed to attend the trial. In case of his failure, the trial Court would be at liberty to take action in accordance with law. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Page 2 of 2 Tufail
